steps.title: Identify the research goal in the notes
steps.content: The notes state that Meiri's team “investigated which factors influence lizard clutch size”—this is the research aim. The first note provides the context: these factors have been well studied in birds but not in lizards.

steps.title: Match the aim to the answer choices
steps.content: Choice A directly states the research goal—”Researchers wanted to know which factors influence lizard egg clutch size because such factors have been well studied in birds but not in lizards”—capturing both what the researchers aimed to do and why. The other three describe methods, procedures, or findings rather than the research aim. That matches choice A — A is correct.
